error.scenario: Source record count changed between extraction start and validation
error.trigger: Source system writing new records during extraction window

error.scenario: Null records filtered out that should have been loaded
error.trigger: Overly aggressive null filtering in transformation

error.scenario: Pipeline failing due to clock skew between components
error.trigger: NTP sync failure causing timestamp comparison errors

error.scenario: Database view dependency not refreshed before pipeline query
error.trigger: Materialised view refresh job failed silently

error.scenario: Required reference data field missing after source refactoring
error.trigger: Source system removed field assumed mandatory by pipeline

error.scenario: Worker pod evicted during task execution in Kubernetes
error.trigger: Node resource pressure causing pod eviction

error.scenario: Account number null due to source masking policy change
error.trigger: Source data masking applied to previously unmasked field

error.scenario: Database lock wait causing job to stall
error.trigger: Long-running transaction on target holding lock

error.scenario: Records lost during network transmission
error.trigger: Network packet loss during large data transfer

error.scenario: External API call within pipeline hanging indefinitely
error.trigger: Third-party API not returning response without timeout

error.scenario: Large JSON payload fully loaded into memory before processing
error.trigger: Non-streaming JSON parsing on large payload

error.scenario: Records dropped during transformation due to filter logic error
error.trigger: Incorrect filter condition in transformation rule

error.scenario: File decompression taking longer than expected
error.trigger: Compressed source file larger than anticipated

error.scenario: Pipeline config file updated with incorrect values
error.trigger: Manual config edit introducing incorrect parameter value

error.scenario: Source system overloaded and rejecting connections
error.trigger: High traffic volume on source system

error.scenario: Writing to future date partition not yet created
error.trigger: Timestamp in source data ahead of current date

error.scenario: Required upstream dataset not yet available in target location
error.trigger: Upstream job failed silently without triggering downstream block

error.scenario: Mandatory customer segment field missing for B2B transactions
error.trigger: B2B transaction type not mapped to customer segment logic

error.scenario: Upstream SLA window changed without downstream notification
error.trigger: Upstream team changed delivery SLA without updating dependency config

error.scenario: Upstream pipeline delayed beyond dependency wait timeout
error.trigger: Upstream data source delayed causing downstream SLA breach

error.scenario: String value cannot be cast to integer for numeric field
error.trigger: Source sending free-text in a field expected to be numeric

error.scenario: DAG import error due to Python syntax error in DAG file
error.trigger: Code deployment introducing syntax error in DAG definition

error.scenario: Null records filtered out that should have been loaded
error.trigger: Overly aggressive null filtering in transformation

error.scenario: Data volume spike causing job to run beyond timeout
error.trigger: Month-end or quarter-end data surge without timeout adjustment

error.scenario: Circular dependency introduced in DAG task graph
error.trigger: New task added creating undetected circular dependency

error.scenario: Null records filtered out that should have been loaded
error.trigger: Overly aggressive null filtering in transformation

error.scenario: Required fields missing for records migrated from legacy system
error.trigger: Legacy system not storing fields that new system requires

error.scenario: GCS file sensor waiting for file that was not dropped
error.trigger: File-based trigger not receiving expected file from upstream

error.scenario: Pipeline re-run after failure loading same data twice
error.trigger: Manual re-trigger without clearing previously loaded records

error.trigger: New record category introduced at source without full field population

error.trigger: B2B transaction type not mapped to customer segment logic
